name: grep-excel 0.7.1
cmd: cd /tmp/bench && ./grep_excel bench.csv -x "SELECT Dept, COUNT(*), AVG(Amount) FROM bench.bench GROUP BY Dept ORDER BY 2 DESC" -f simple

name: octosql 0.13.0
cmd: cd /tmp/bench && OCTOSQL_NO_TELEMETRY=1 ./octosql "SELECT Dept, COUNT(*), AVG(Amount) FROM bench.csv GROUP BY Dept ORDER BY 2 DESC" -o stream_native

name: dsq 0.23.0
cmd: cd /tmp/bench && ./dsq bench.csv "SELECT Dept, COUNT(*), AVG(Amount) FROM {} GROUP BY Dept ORDER BY 2 DESC"

name: trdsql 1.2.3
cmd: cd /tmp/bench && ./trdsql -ih "SELECT Dept, COUNT(*), AVG(Amount) FROM bench.csv GROUP BY Dept ORDER BY 2 DESC"

name: miller 6.20.2 (DSL)
cmd: cd /tmp/bench && ./mlr --csv stats1 -a count,mean -f Amount -g Dept bench.csv
